raw_content.homepage: Global Excellence Awards 2025, GEA2025 by Brand Empower About GEA 2025 Who Can Participate Award Categories --> GEA Gallery Media Coverage Nominate Now! Presents Global Excellence Awards 2025 Held Successfully With Chief Guest Padma Shri Mrs. Kajol Devgan in Mumbai Global Excellence Awards 2025 Venue: Mumbai, India --> Nominations Open Till: 20 th Apr 2026 --> Event Date: 17 th August 2025 --> Days Hours Minutes Second --> View Categories Nominate Now! for GEA 2025 --> Digital Marketing Partner Telecast Partner Venue Partner --> About Global Excellence Awards Entries are closing soon for Global Excellence Awards 2025 Award Date: 17th August 2025 Mumbai, India --> Submit Your Nomination --> Nominate Your Business Now! --> Become a Sponsor! --> Global Excellence Awards is a remarkable initiative by Brand Empower Pvt. Limited to recognize different businesses, entrepreneurs, and service providers for their exceptional performance and accomplishments in their respective areas and it will showcase the businesses that have navigated the tough conditions by innovating, creating jobs, achieving growth, and supporting their communities and the planet. Brand Empower Pvt. Ltd. , which is headquartered in New Delhi, is an award-winning Market Research, Branding, and Creative PR company. The goal of the GEA is to support and honor the creativity, innovation, and quality of entrepreneurs, artists, companies, and individuals in the fields of manufacturing, services, entertainment, media, etc. GEA is considered as one of the most prestigious corporate awards and it greatly enhances the fame & reputation of GEA Winners around the world. Global Excellence Awards Editions: GEA 2018 (New Delhi): Guest of Honor - Mrs. Raveena Tandon GEA 2019 (Mumbai): Guest of Honor - Mrs. Madhuri Dixit Nene GEA 2020 - Postponed due to the Covid -19 pandemic GEA 2021 - Postponed due to the Covid -19 pandemic GEA 2022 (Mumbai): Guest of Honor - Mr. Anupam Kher GEA 2023 (Mumbai): Guest of Honor - Mrs. Madhuri Dixit Nene GEA 2024 (Mumbai): Guest of Honor - Mrs. Shilpa Shetty Kundra GEA 2025 (Mumbai): Guest of Honor - Mrs. Kajol Devgan Know More About The Organiser Global Excellence Awards & Convention 2024 Upcoming Guest of Honor : Mrs. Shilpa Shetty Kundra Anchor : TBA Key Dates - GEA 2024 Nominations Open Till: Apr 2026 Event Date: Sunday, 12 th May 2024 Location: Hotel Sahara Star, Mumbai If you believe that you deserve this Recognition for your Hard Work, Quality & Achievements Nominate Your Business Now! Award Timeline of GEA 2024 19 th Feb, 2024 Nominations Start Feb - Mar, 2024 Scale-Up networking event 20 th Apr 2026 15 th April 2024 Nominations Close 2 nd May, 2024 Selection of Winners by Independent Jury 12 th May , 2024 Announcement of Finalists 12 th May, 2024 Awards Gala Night with Cocktail Dinner --> Who Can Participate Global Excellence Awards is a celebration of excellence of emerging and enthusiastic businesses and entrepreneurs that run them. Now, it is the right time to give your business an edge over the competition. So, hurry up and Nominate Your Business NOW! Entrepreneurs Business Services Manufacturing Healthcare Startups Individual Personal Beauty & Wellness NGOs Education Tourism & Hospitality Food & Beverages Real Estate Retails & Ecommerce Technology Luxury Lifestyle View All Categories Visit official website of Brandempower GEA Gallery GEA 2025 GEA 2024 NQA 2024 ILA 2023 GEA 2023 NQA 2023 ILA 2022 GEA 2022 GEA 2019 GEA 2018 More Photos Selection Process Research Comprehensive research is done to discover recognisable brands. Nominations Eligible brands are invited to participate through nominations. --> Shortlisting Committee of experts & jury shortlists the best out of the best nominees. Communication Communication is established with the shortlisted brands for their confirmation. Recognition Selected & confirmed brands are recognised for their excellence in their respective industry. PR & Branding Telecast is done on National TV Channel as well as covered through PR on online news & media sites through an effective PR campaign. Participate Now! About GEA & Convention 2024 “Global Excellence Awards" is a platform for the entrepreneurs, industry leaders, innovators, and experts to come together and share their knowledge, insights, and experiences. It provides opportunities for attendees to network with like-minded professionals, learn from the best in the business, and explore new achievements. This majestic award is a remarkable initiative by Brand Empower Pvt. Ltd. under the leadership of Mr. Rahul Ranjan Singh , CEO of the company who has helped in shedding light on the struggles, hardships, journeys, and milestones achieved by several brands that are working tirelessly for the upliftment of the Indian economy. GEA has provided a platform for businesses where entrepreneurs across the nation can present their ideas and strategies and get that limelight and attention which they actually deserve." Key Highlights Of GEA & Convention 2024: Invitation for two people for the GEA Ceremony Networking opportunities to meet new people and build professional relationships. Valuable Industry insights Recognition & Validation for hard work and achievements New ideas and perspectives Education and learning about new industries Brand exposure Fun and celebration Nominate Your Business Now!
